summary: The diff implements all 8 requirements (REQ-25 through REQ-32) with high fidelity. The Parent Insight Portal is added as a 9th navigation tab in Navbar.tsx and App.tsx, a root ParentInsightPortal.tsx component is created with 3 sub-menus and a persistent bottom panel, all four sub-sections of each menu are implemented with the required data fields, the Monthly Parent Connect panel includes meeting scheduling/feedback/rating, a Print button triggers window.print(), and CSS tokens are defined in index.css. A few minor gaps exist: the print CSS hiding navigation bars and interactive controls is not clearly evidenced in the diff, and the dark mode variants for parent portal tokens are not confirmed in the truncated index.css diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Print-specific CSS applied so that the currently visible dashboard content renders in a clean, report-style printable layout — hiding the navigation bars, interactive controls, and sidebar elements while preserving charts, progress meters, performance data, and summary cards.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows window.print() is called and a 'no-print' class is used on some elements, but no explicit @media print CSS rules are visible in the truncated index.css diff to confirm that navigation bars, tab controls, and interactive buttons are hidden in print output while preserving charts and data cards.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the theme respects the existing light/dark mode toggle — dark mode variants for parent portal tokens must be defined.
missing_requirements.reason: The index.css diff shows parent portal tokens defined in :root but the .dark section is truncated. It is not confirmed that dark mode variants for the parent portal palette are defined.
